Argentina.status: Managed minutes, still expected in marquee windows
Argentina.headline: Still the single biggest audience magnet in the squad.
Argentina.recent_form: Even with workload management, Messi remains Argentina's central attention driver in premium fixtures.
details: Defending champion spotlight keeps his matches premium
Availability is the main variable, not quality

Australia.headline: Australia's most bankable current midfield reference point.
Australia.recent_form: Irvine's consistency and box-to-box output make him the safest player-to-watch call for Australia.

Austria.headline: Still Austria's clearest global-name pull when available.
Austria.recent_form: Alaba's leadership and profile keep him the key watchpoint even when availability needs monitoring.
details: Health status materially affects the team's ceiling

Belgium.headline: Belgium's premium audience pull still starts with De Bruyne.
Belgium.recent_form: His passing range and star recognition still define Belgium's high-end broadcast appeal.
details: Physical management remains a key storyline

Brazil.headline: Brazil's most explosive current one-v-one threat.
Brazil.recent_form: Vinicius brings the clearest combination of form, star power and highlight probability in this Brazil side.
details: Huge crossover appeal beyond Brazil fans
A major driver of marquee-match upside

Canada.headline: Canada's biggest pace-and-profile draw.
Canada.recent_form: Davies remains the face of Canada's tournament potential and the player most likely to turn host fixtures into global highlights.

Colombia.headline: Colombia's most dynamic global-facing attacker.
Colombia.recent_form: Diaz's directness and club visibility make him Colombia's strongest player-to-watch call right now.
details: Form keeps Colombia in the premium middle tier

Croatia.status: Managed but highly likely for big matches
Croatia.headline: The emotional and tactical center of Croatia's big-stage identity.
Croatia.recent_form: Modric still defines Croatia's viewing appeal because every late-round match carries legacy weight around him.
details: Workload management is the only major caveat

Ecuador.headline: Ecuador's clearest current elite-club reference point.
Ecuador.recent_form: Caicedo gives Ecuador a modern midfield focal point with stronger international recognition than most peers.
details: Premier League visibility helps audience pull

England.headline: England's biggest current crossover star.
England.recent_form: Bellingham combines elite-level output, youth-star magnetism and strong neutral appeal better than anyone else in the squad.
details: One of the strongest non-host TV magnets

France.headline: France's clear No. 1 appointment-viewing figure.
France.recent_form: Mbappe remains one of the few players who can shift a match from premium to must-watch almost by himself.

Germany.headline: Germany's most electric current attacking talent.
Germany.recent_form: Musiala now carries more upside as a pure player-to-watch than any other Germany starter.
details: Major contributor to Germany's premium ceiling

Japan.headline: Japan's clearest flair-and-creation focal point.
Japan.recent_form: Kubo gives Japan the strongest blend of technical excitement and global recognizability in the current cycle.
details: A clean stylistic fit for player-to-watch billing

Mexico.headline: Mexico's most obvious current finishing focal point.
Mexico.recent_form: Gimenez adds a modern scorer profile to Mexico's already massive baseline audience value.
details: Fits the premium Spanish-language window story

Morocco.headline: Morocco's strongest current blend of form and star familiarity.
Morocco.recent_form: Hakimi remains the cleanest single-player symbol of Morocco's post-2022 relevance.

Netherlands.headline: The Netherlands' most exciting current attacking watch.
Netherlands.recent_form: Simons brings the freshest star-energy to a historically premium Dutch brand.
details: Adds extra curiosity in neutral fixtures

Paraguay.headline: Paraguay's highest-upside attacking name.
Paraguay.recent_form: Enciso is the clearest breakout-watch option in a side whose audience pull usually comes from the opponent.

Portugal.status: Expected in marquee matches, minutes managed
Portugal.headline: No player in the squad changes raw attention more than Ronaldo.
Portugal.recent_form: Even with age-related management, Ronaldo remains Portugal's biggest audience multiplier.
details: Availability affects upside more than baseline

Senegal.headline: Senegal's biggest star and broadest-recognition player.
Senegal.recent_form: Mane remains the strongest player-to-watch hook for Senegal in global-facing matches.
details: Carries the team's biggest name value

South Africa.headline: South Africa's most recognizable attacking outlet.
South Africa.recent_form: Tau remains the easiest single-player reference point when South Africa appears in modeled fixtures.
details: Context matters more than pure star gravity

South Korea.status: Fitness watched, still premium if available
South Korea.headline: South Korea's audience value rises sharply when Son is central.
South Korea.recent_form: Son remains one of Asia's few truly global football stars, making his availability crucial to the model.

Spain.headline: Spain's breakout superstar and current attention engine.
Spain.recent_form: Yamal's production and buzz make him the most exciting player-to-watch pick in the tournament model.
details: Massive influence on Spain's current TV pull

United States.headline: The clearest face of the U.S. host-market story.
United States.recent_form: Pulisic remains the central attacking reference for the U.S. and the biggest individual draw for English-language windows.
details: Core figure in U.S. premium inventory matches

Uruguay.headline: Uruguay's best two-way big-match driver.
Uruguay.recent_form: Valverde gives Uruguay the strongest combination of recent level, club visibility and all-phase influence.
details: A stronger current watch than a pure-name veteran pick
